description: UNPKG is a content delivery network for files published to npm packages. It lets users fetch package assets directly by URL and browse package contents by package name, version, and path.
summary: unpkg.com exposes a public HTTP package CDN surface at `https://unpkg.com` for fetching and browsing npm package files; no separate REST API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI for unpkg.com itself was found.
